description: Having or showing enthusiasm, affection, or kindness; emotionally welcoming. 'Koeli' names the quality of emotional warmth—the heart that welcomes, the manner that makes others feel at ease.
sound_symbolism: The word embraces gently. 'Ko' begins with clear welcome, presence offered. The vowel 'e' opens to connection, warmth flowing. Then 'li' settles with light kindness, emotional warmth complete.
grammatical_notes: Functions as an adjective: 'koeli miona' (warm person). Distinct from 'sulae' (warm in temperature). Names the quality of welcoming kindness in manner and feeling.

pillars.peace-linguistics-practices: Warm communication creates safety—the welcoming tone that helps others feel heard and valued.
pillars.secular-buddhist-philosophy: Warm-heartedness (metta) radiates goodwill—the open heart that wishes well for all beings.
